name: scikit-survival
tagline: Guides survival-analysis modeling in Python's scikit-survival: model selection, preprocessing, evaluation metrics, and pitfalls, with six.
verdict: Clean, well-structured library-usage skill with no security concerns: no network calls, installs, secrets, or shell execution. Decision tree and best-practices/pitfalls sections give deterministic, actionable guidance; all six referenced files verified to exist. Weak spots: no stated exclusions for when not to use it, and it never declares scikit-survival.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language anywhere in description or body.
Every example imports sksurv but no line ever states an install/version-check step for the scikit-survival package itself.
